revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23985667504|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:羽田エアポートガーデン]][[zh:羽田機場花園]] * {{Pathnav|HANEDA GLOBAL WINGS|frame=1}} {{建築物 |名称 = Haneda Airport Garden |旧名称 = |image = [[File:Haneda Airport Garden (Ready to open) from Tamagawa Sky Bridge April 2022.jpg|250px]] |image説明 = Haneda Airport Garden as seen from the Tamagawa Sky Bridge |用途 = {{plainlist| * [[Hotel]] * [[Day-Use Bath Facility|Onsen Facility]] * [[MICE facility]] * [[Shopping Center]] * [[Bus Terminal]] }} |旧用途 = Former airport grounds |設計者 = {{ill|Nikken Sekkei|en|Nikken Sekkei|qid=Q2804130|lt=Nikken Sekkei|1=Nikken Sekkei}} |構造設計者 = |設備設計者 = |施工 = [[Nishimatsu Construction]] |建築主 = |事業主体 = Haneda Airport Urban Development (a 100% subsidiary of Sumitomo Realty & Development) |管理運営 = {{ill|Sumitomo Realty & Development|en|Sumitomo Realty & Development|qid=Q4050347|lt=Sumitomo Realty & Development|1=Sumitomo Realty & Development}}
[[Villa Fontaine|Sumitomo Realty Villa Fontaine]]
Sumitomo Realty Commercial Management |構造形式 = |敷地面積 = 43,000 |敷地面積ref = |敷地面積備考 = |建築面積 = |建築面積ref = |建築面積備考 = |延床面積 = 91,500 |延床面積ref = |延床面積備考 = Commercial floor area: 7,536 m² |状態 = |階数 = 12 floors above ground |高さ = |エレベーター数 = |戸数 = |駐車台数 = 440 spaces |着工 = April [[2018th year ]] |竣工 = March [[2020th year ]] |開館開所 = Partially opened on December 21, 2022
Fully opened on January 31, 2023 |改築 = |解体 = |所在地郵便番号 = 144-0041 |所在地 = {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}} [[Ōta Ward]] [[Haneda Airport (Ōta)|Haneda Airport]] 2-7-1 |緯度度 = 35 |緯度分 = 32 |緯度秒 = 40 |N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N |経度度 = 139 |経度分 = 45 |経度秒 = 51 |E(東経)及びW(西経) = E |地図国コード = JP-13 |座標右上表示 = Yes |位置図種類 = Tokyo city#Japan Tokyo#Japan |文化財 = |指定・登録等日 = | website = {{URL|https://www.shopping-sumitomo-rd.com/haneda/shopping/about/}} |備考 = Source }} {{Hotel |名称 = Hotel Villa Fontaine Haneda Airport |正式名称 = |image = {{画像募集中|cat=大田区}} |imageサイズ = |image説明 = |チェーン = |デベロッパー = |設計 = |施工 = |運営 = Sumitomo Realty Villa Fontaine |所有者 = |前身 = |敷地面積 = |建築面積 = |延べ床面積 = |最低階 = 2 |最高階 = 12 |最頂部 = |レストラン数 = 3 |部屋数 = 1,557 |シングル数 = |ダブル数 = |ツイン数 = |和室数 = |スイート数 = |駐車場 = |開業日 = December 21, 2022 |改装 = |閉業日 = |最寄駅 = |最寄IC = |所在地郵便番号 = |所在地 = Tokyo, Ōta Ward, Haneda Airport 2-7-1 | 緯度度 = |緯度分 = |緯度秒 = | 経度度 = |経度分 = |経度秒 = |座標右上表示 = |HP = |補足 = }} {{商業施設 |書式 = |名称 = Shopping City Haneda Airport Garden |外国語名称 = |image = {{画像募集中|cat=大田区}} |image説明 = |地図 = |郵便番号 = |所在地 = Tokyo, Ōta Ward, Haneda Airport 2-7-1 |緯度度 = |緯度分 = |緯度秒 = |経度度 = |経度分 = |経度秒 = |座標右上表示 = |開業日 = January 31, 2023 |閉業日 = |店番号 = |正式名称 = |建物名称 = |土地所有者 = |施設所有者 = |施設管理者 = Sumitomo Realty Commercial Management |設計者 = |施工者 = |敷地面積 = |敷地面積脚注 = |敷地面積備考 = |建築面積 = |建築面積脚注 = |建築面積備考 = |延床面積 = |延床面積脚注 = |延床面積備考 = |商業施設面積 = 7536 |商業施設面積脚注 = |商業施設面積備考 = |店舗数 = Approximately 80 stores |中核店舗 = |営業時間 = Varies by store |駐車台数 = |駐車台数脚注 = |駐車台数備考 = |駐輪台数 = |駐輪台数脚注 = |駐輪台数備考 = |前身 = |後身 = |商圏人口 = |最寄駅 = |最寄バス停 = |最寄IC = |External links = }} '''Haneda Airport Garden''' (はねだエアポートガーデン) is a multi-use commercial complex developed by {{ill|Sumitomo Realty & Development|en|Sumitomo Realty & Development|qid=Q4050347|lt=Sumitomo Realty & Development|1=Sumitomo Realty & Development}} located in {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}'s [[Ōta Ward]] at {{ill|Haneda Airport|en|Haneda Airport|qid=Q204853|lt=Haneda Airport|1=Haneda Airport}}. It is directly connected to Terminal 3 of [[:en:Tokyo International Airport|Haneda Airport]] via a connecting passageway.{{Cite news|和書|url=https://www.nikkei.com/article/DGXMZO56180920Y0A220C2L83000/|title=複合施設 in Haneda to Open in April / Sumitomo Realty: Large Hotel and Onsen Facilities|newspaper={{ill|The Nikkei|en|The Nikkei|qid=Q1077694|lt=Nikkei|1=The Nikkei}}|publisher={{ill|Nikkei, Inc.|en|Nikkei, Inc.|qid=Q11508838|lt=Nikkei Inc.|1=Nikkei, Inc.}}|edition=Morning|date=2020-02-29|page=Tokyo & Metropolitan Economy|accessdate=2020-03-04}} [https://www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQOCC086W90Y2A201C2000000/ Haneda Airport Garden Fully Opens on January 31] - Nikkei, December 8, 2022[https://www.sumitomo-rd.co.jp/uploads/20221208_release_haneda-airportgarden_grand-opening.pdf "Haneda Airport Garden" Fully Opened on January 31, 2023] - Sumitomo Realty, December 8, 2022 == Overview == In March 2008 (Heisei 20), the Haneda Airport Relocation Issue Council, consisting of the {{ill|Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism|en|Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism|qid=Q1376196|lt=Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism|1=Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism}}, Tokyo, Ōta Ward, and [[Shinagawa Ward]], developed the "Basic Plan for the Utilization of the Haneda Airport Site" for the area generated by the expansion and redevelopment of Haneda Airport[https://www.mlit.go.jp/kisha/kisha08/12/120328_3_.html Regarding the Compilation of the Basic Plan for the Utilization of the Haneda Airport Site] - Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism, March 28, 2008. In October 2010 (Heisei 22), a "Haneda Airport Site Town Planning Promotion Plan" was formulated to put the plan into concrete terms[https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/seikatsu/sumaimachinami/haneda_airport/kukoatochi/suishinkeikaku.html Haneda Airport Site Town Planning Promotion Plan (October, Heisei 22)] - Ōta Ward, Tokyo, July 15, 2016. The government designated the area surrounding Haneda Airport as a National Strategic Special Zone to expand the acceptance of inbound tourists and enhance international competitiveness[https://www.y20221012 link] - Y20221012 and named the area "HANEDA GLOBAL WINGS"[https://www.city.ota.tokyo.jp/seikatsu/sumaimachinami/haneda_airport/kukoatochi/hanedakuukouatoti_sinmeisyou.html The Area's New Name: HANEDA GLOBAL WINGS] - Ōta Ward, February 10, 2020. In Zone 2 of this area, aimed at increasing the number of foreign tourists, the Sumitomo Realty Group developed "Haneda Airport Garden"{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.sumitomo-rd.co.jp/uploads/20191210_release_haneda-airport-garden-_happyou.pdf|title=2020 Spring Opening Announcement of the All-in-One Hotel "Haneda Airport Garden" – A Project by Haneda Airport Urban Development|format=PDF|publisher=Haneda Airport Urban Development Co., Ltd.|date=2019-12-10|accessdate=2019-12-17}}. Haneda Airport Garden is a 12-story building with a total floor area of approximately 91,500 m² (of which the commercial facility area is 7,536 m²){{R|日経20200229}}. The facility includes a hotel (operated by [[Villa Fontaine|Sumitomo Realty Villa Fontaine]]), commercial facilities, an onsen (hot spring) facility, a MICE facility (Bellsaal), and a bus terminal. Originally, the complex was scheduled to open on April 19, 2020 (Reiwa 2) but was postponed due to the effects of the {{ill|COVID-19 pandemic|en|COVID-19 pandemic|qid=Q81068910|lt=COVID-19 pandemic|1=COVID-19 pandemic}}. It eventually fully opened on January 31, 2023 (Reiwa 5).[https://www.sumitomo-rd.co.jp/uploads/20221006_release_haneda-airportgarden_shidou.pdf "Haneda Airport Garden" Grand Opening, January 31, 2023] - Sumitomo Realty, October 6, 2022[https://www.prtimes.jp/main/html/rd/p/000000089.000062100.html "Here is the New Haneda" – Haneda Airport Garden Fully Opened on January 31, 2023] - PR TIMES, January 31, 2023 Additionally, prior to the facility's opening, on March 12, 2022, the new Tama River Sky Bridge was opened to connect the area near Haneda Airport Garden to the opposite bank in {{ill|Kawasaki|en|Kawasaki|qid=Q224704|lt=Kawasaki|1=Kawasaki}}, further enhancing connectivity.[https://www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQOCC086W90Y2A201C2000000/ New Tama River Sky Bridge Connecting Haneda to Kawasaki Opens] - Nikkei, July 6, 2021. The design was by {{ill|Nikken Sekkei|en|Nikken Sekkei|qid=Q2804130|lt=Nikken Sekkei|1=Nikken Sekkei}}, construction by [[Nishimatsu Construction]], and the facility is managed and operated by {{ill|Sumitomo Realty & Development|en|Sumitomo Realty & Development|qid=Q4050347|lt=Sumitomo Realty & Development|1=Sumitomo Realty & Development}} (via Sumitomo Realty Villa Fontaine and Sumitomo Realty Commercial Management). == Facilities == The complex includes a hotel, an onsen facility “Izumi Tenkuu no Yu Haneda Airport”, and the Bellsaal Haneda Airport MICE facility, which all opened partially on December 21, 2022. === Hotel Villa Fontaine Haneda Airport === Operated by Sumitomo Realty Villa Fontaine. ; Villa Fontaine Premier Haneda Airport : A luxury hotel with 160 rooms.[https://www.hvf.jp/hanedaairport-premier/ Villa Fontaine Premier Haneda Airport] - Sumitomo Realty Villa Fontaine ; Villa Fontaine Grand Haneda Airport : A high-grade hotel with 1,557 rooms.[https://www.hvf.jp//hanedaairport-grand/ Villa Fontaine Grand Haneda Airport] - Sumitomo Realty Villa Fontaine === Izumi Tenkuu no Yu Haneda Airport === An onsen facility offering natural hot spring bathing, known as “Haneda Airport Izumi Tenkuu no Yu”.[https://www.shopping-sumitomo-rd.com/haneda/spa-izumi/ Izumi Tenkuu no Yu Haneda Airport] - Sumitomo Realty Villa Fontaine[https://www.shopping-sumitomo-rd.com/haneda/spa-izumi/img/top/spa_info221006.pdf Announcement: Haneda Airport Izumi Tenkuu no Yu Opening on December 21, 2022] - Sumitomo Realty Villa Fontaine It is available not only for guests of Hotel Villa Fontaine but also for day-use visitors. The facility includes open-air baths, a rock bath, and saunas. === Bellsaal Haneda Airport === A MICE facility directly connected to Haneda Airport, featuring a 1,109 m² hall and 10 meeting rooms.[https://www.hvf.jp/conference/hanedaairport/ Bellsaal Haneda Airport] - Sumitomo Realty Villa Fontaine === Shopping City Haneda Airport Garden === A shopping center operated by Sumitomo Realty Commercial Management.[https://www.shopping-sumitomo-rd.com/haneda/shopping/#shop Shopping City Haneda Airport Garden] - Sumitomo Realty Commercial Management It is divided into four areas and houses approximately 80 stores offering a food court, restaurants, cafes, fashion, miscellaneous goods, and services: * Haneda Food Selection: Restaurants and food court * Japan Promenade: Sale of famous Japanese products * Haneda Sando: Souvenirs and travel goods * Haneda Collection: Fashion === Haneda Airport Garden Bus Terminal === A bus terminal operated by Sumitomo Realty Commercial Management that is designated as a general bus terminal under the [[Automobile Terminal Law]].[https://www.shopping-sumitomo-rd.com/haneda/shopping/index.html#bus Shopping City Haneda Airport Garden] - Sumitomo Realty Commercial Management * For limousine and highway buses: 10 berths * For route and group buses: 5 berths === Bus Routes === Several bus routes operate from the bus terminal area of [[:en:Tokyo International Airport|Tokyo International Airport]] (Haneda).[https://tokyo-haneda.com/access/bus/index.html High-Speed and Local Buses] - Tokyo International Airport[https://www.shopping-sumitomo-rd.com/haneda/busterminal/search.html Bus Route Search] - Haneda Airport Garden {| class="sortable wikitable" ! Bus Company !! Route Name !! Destination |- | [[Sakura Kotsu]] || || Aomori, Yamagata, Sakata, Niigata, Kanazawa, Toyama |- | [[Tokyo Fuji Kotsu]] || Night Liner || Sendai |- | [[Heiwa Kotsu (Chiba)|Heiwa Kotsu]] || My Town Liner[http://heiwakotsu.com/timefare_sinyats.htm My Town Liner – Late Night Express Bus] - Heiwa Kotsu || Chiba, Soga |- | [[Kanze Kotsu]] || Ikaho/Shimman Onsen Line[https://kan-etsu.net/publics/index/137 Ikaho/Shimman Onsen Line – Haneda Route] - Kan-Etsu Kotsu || {{ill|Ikaho Onsen|ja|伊香保温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikaho Onsen|qq=}} and {{ill|Shima Onsen|en|Shima Onsen|qid=Q30595841|lt=Shimman Onsen|1=Shima Onsen}} |- | [[Izumi Kankō Bus (Niigata)|Izumi Kankō Bus]] || NETWORK || Niigata, Niitsu |- | [[JAM JAM Express]] || Schpul Liner || Hakuba |- | {{ill|Willer Express|en|Willer Express|qid=Q11253679|lt=Willer Express|1=Willer Express}} || || Nagano |- | Tanzawa Kōtsū || Connect Liner || Kanazawa |- | WILLER EXPRESS・[[Tokai Bus]]・[[Izu-Hakone Bus]] || Mishima Haneda Shuttle[https://www.tokaibus.jp/kousoku/mishima_haneda.html Mishima Haneda Shuttle] - Tokai Bus || Mishima |- | [[Shizutetsu Just Line]] || Shizuoka Haneda Airport Line[https://www.justline.co.jp/express/news/kosoku202212271200.html Direct Bus between Shizuoka and Haneda Airport to Start January 31, 2023] - Shizutetsu Just Line || Shizuoka |- | [[Aoki Bus]] || Aozora Liner || Nagoya, Ise |- | Owl Kōtsū || OWL LINER || Osaka |} Bus routes scheduled to start between January and March 2023 have been announced.[https://www.sumitomo-rd.co.jp/uploads/20230112_release_HANEDA-AIRPORT-GARDEN-busterminal.pdf Haneda Airport Garden Bus Terminal Launch Announcement] - Sumitomo Realty Group, January 12, 2023 A free shuttle bus, the "Garden Shuttle" (operated by {{ill|Keisei Bus|en|Keisei Bus|qid=Q11374367|lt=Keisei Bus|1=Keisei Bus}}), also operates from Bus Stand 13 at the group terminal to [[Ariake Garden]].[https://www.shopping-sumitomo-rd.com/ariake/facility_notice/detail/296/ 【Updated 6/24】 Ariake Garden ⇔ Haneda Airport Garden Free Shuttle Bus Announced] == Transportation == * By {{ill|Keikyu|en|Keikyu|qid=Q1322206|lt=Keikyu|1=Keikyu}} and {{ill|Tokyo Monorail|en|Tokyo Monorail|qid=Q788158|lt=Tokyo Monorail|1=Tokyo Monorail}}: Alight at {{ill|Haneda Airport Terminal 3 Station|en|Haneda Airport Terminal 3 Station|qid=Q11284112|lt=Haneda Airport Terminal 3 Station|1=Haneda Airport Terminal 3 Station}}. == Footnotes == === Annotations === {{Notelist2}} === Sources === {{Reflist}} == Related Items == * [[Ariake Garden]] == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline}} * {{Official website|https://www.shopping-sumitomo-rd.com/haneda/shopping/|Haneda Airport Garden}} * {{Official website|https://www.hvf.jp/hanedaairport-premier/|Villa Fontaine Premier Haneda Airport}} * {{Official website|https://www.hvf.jp//hanedaairport-grand/|Villa Fontaine Grand Haneda Airport}} * {{Official website|https://www.shopping-sumitomo-rd.com/haneda/spa-izumi/|Izumi Tenkuu no Yu Haneda Airport}} * {{Official website|https://www.hvf.jp/conference/hanedaairport/|Bellsaal Haneda Airport}} {{東京都特別区のバスターミナル}} {{リダイレクトの所属カテゴリ |redirect1 = ホテルヴィラフォンテーヌ羽田空港 |1-1 = 東京都のホテル |1-2 = 住友不動産 |1-3 = 2022nd year 開業の施設}} {{translated page|ja|羽田エアポートガーデン|version=104314695|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:羽田エアポートガーデン]] [[ja:東京都]] [[ja:熱海温泉]] [[ja:静岡県]] [[ja:白浜温泉]] [[ja:和歌山県]] [[ja:小浜温泉]] [[ja:長崎県]] [[ja:瀬波温泉]] [[ja:新潟県]] [[ja:指宿温泉]] [[ja:鹿児島県]] {{Commons category|Haneda Airport Garden}} [[zh:羽田機場花園]] {{wikidata link|Q85883236}} [[Category:Brine spring]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Japan completed in 2020]] [[Category:Bus stations in Japan]] [[Category:Bus Stops in Kantō Region]] [[Category:Commercial Facilities in Ota Ward]] [[Category:Haneda Airport]] [[Category:Image Requests for Ota Ward]] [[Category:Shopping malls in Tokyo]] [[Category:Sumitomo Realty & Development Co.]] [[Category:Urban renewal districts in Tokyo]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 150+ untranslated japanese characters]]
